description: Commit and push from project root

command:
cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/src/routes/sync.ts packages/backend/src/worker.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Prevent concurrent syncs for the same source

Use jobId dedup on manual sync triggers so BullMQ won't queue duplicates.
Track active syncs in the worker and skip if a source is already syncing.
EOF
)" && git push

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/src/routes/admin.ts packages/web/src/app/admin/sources/page.tsx packages/web/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Admin: add Sources page with per-source sync interval config

List all calendar sources with user, provider, status, last sync.
Dropdown to change sync interval (1min–24h) per source, immediately
reschedules the BullMQ job. Searchable and paginated.
EOF
)" && git push

description: Check if Prisma types are available locally
List CI workflow files from GitHub
Check if workflow dir exists locally
Run tsc (full build, not just noEmit)
Run turbo build like CI does

command:
cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add .github/workflows/ci.yml packages/backend/src/routes/admin.ts packages/backend/src/routes/target-calendar.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix CI: add prisma generate step, fix implicit any types

CI was missing prisma generate before typecheck, causing CalendarSource
and CalendarEntry import errors. Also fix implicit any parameters in
admin.ts and target-calendar.ts map callbacks.
EOF
)" && git push
cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/backend/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -5 && cd packages/web && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -5

DATABASE_URL="postgresql://dummy:dummy@localhost:5432/dummy" npx prisma migrate diff --from-schema-datamodel <(git show HEAD:packages/backend/prisma/schema.prisma) --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script 2>&1
cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/backend/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -5 && cd packages/web && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -5

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/src/routes/event-types.ts packages/backend/src/routes/event-types.test.ts packages/backend/package.json package-lock.json && git diff --staged --stat

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/prisma/migrations/4_fix_availability_unique_index/migration.sql packages/backend/src/routes/event-types.test.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix availability rules unique constraint conflict

Migration 1 tried DROP CONSTRAINT to remove the old (userId, dayOfWeek)
unique, but it was created as a unique INDEX in migration 0, so it
survived. This caused P2002 errors when upserting per-event-type rules.
EOF
)"

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/prisma/schema.prisma packages/backend/prisma/migrations/5_add_user_branding_fields/migration.sql packages/backend/src/routes/profile.ts packages/backend/src/routes/public-booking.ts packages/web/src/app/B/\[hash\]/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/book/\[username\]/\[slug\]/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/booking/page.tsx packages/web/src/components/CalendarView.tsx diary/2026-03-24.md openspec/changes/add-branding-customization/

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/src/routes/public-booking.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Remove attendees from booking calendar events

Guest's Exchange server response caused Google Calendar to remove the
host from their own event. Guest info is already in the description,
so no need to add them as attendees and trigger invite emails.
EOF
)" && git push

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/src/routes/availability.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix default availability returning per-event-type rules

GET /api/availability was missing eventTypeId: null filter, so it
returned both default and per-event-type rules. This caused the
booking settings page to display extra rows and create duplicate
default entries when saving.
EOF
)" && git push

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/web/src/components/AppShell.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/booking/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/booking/new/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/booking/\[id\]/edit/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/booking/\[id\]/preview/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/profile/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/settings/preferences/page.tsx packages/web/src/app/profile/page.tsx && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Reorganize settings into sub-navigation sections

Settings sidebar now shows sub-sections: Calendar Sources, Booking,
Profile, and Preferences. Each has its own page. Profile moved from
/profile to /settings/profile (old URL redirects). Booking pages now
highlight Settings in main nav instead of Bookings.
EOF
)" && git push

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add packages/backend/src/providers/outlook.ts packages/web/src/components/CalendarView.tsx && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix Outlook recurring events missing titles

Graph API delta endpoint omits subject for recurring instances unless
explicitly requested. Added $select parameter to include all needed
fields. Also added meaningful fallback titles for events without
subject (OOF, working elsewhere, focus time) and removed "Ganztägig"
label from calendar view.
EOF
)" && git push
npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -5; cd ../web && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -5
PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -p 4202 -U calendar_sync -d calendar_sync -c "SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename = 'users' AND indexdef LIKE '%username%';" 2>&1
description: Check if username unique index exists

command: PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -p 4202 -U calendar_sync -d calendar_sync -c "SELECT username, count(*) FROM users GROUP BY username HAVING count(*) > 1;" 2>&1
cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && docker compose restart api 2>&1 && sleep 3 && docker compose logs api --tail 5 2>&1
PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -p 4202 -U calendar_sync -d calendar_sync -c "\d calendar_sources" 2>&1 | grep -i fetch
description: Check if column exists in DB

command: docker compose build --no-cache api sync-worker 2>&1 | tail -10
description: Rebuild API and worker without cache

command: docker compose up api sync-worker -d 2>&1 && sleep 3 && docker compose logs api --tail 5 2>&1
description: Restart API and worker with new images

command: docker compose logs api --since 1m 2>&1 | grep -i error; echo "---"; docker compose logs postgres --since 1m 2>&1 | grep -i error
docker compose build --no-cache web 2>&1 | tail -5 && docker compose up web -d 2>&1 | tail -5
source ../../.env 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate dev --name add_sync_health_conflict_booking_views 2>&1 | tail -15

description: Find DB config in any env

command:
MIGRATION_DIR="/Users/cb/git/calendar-sync/packages/backend/prisma/migrations/$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)_add_sync_health_conflict_booking_views"
mkdir -p "$MIGRATION_DIR"
cat > "$MIGRATION_DIR/migration.sql" << 'SQL'
-- CreateTable
CREATE TABLE "sync_health" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "sourceId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "provider" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventsProcessed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "eventsFailed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "latencyMs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "checksumMatch" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

    CONSTRAINT "sync_health_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateTable
CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "userId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventAId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventBId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventATitle" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventBTitle" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventAStart" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,
    "eventBStart" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,
    "eventASource" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventBSource" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "detectedAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "resolvedAt" TIMESTAMP(3),

    CONSTRAINT "conflicts_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateTable
CREATE TABLE "booking_page_views" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "eventTypeId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "date" DATE NOT NULL,
    "viewCount" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,

    CONSTRAINT "booking_page_views_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateIndex
CREATE INDEX "sync_health_userId_createdAt_idx" ON "sync_health"("userId", "createdAt");
CREATE INDEX "sync_health_sourceId_idx" ON "sync_health"("sourceId");

-- CreateIndex
CREATE INDEX "conflicts_userId_resolvedAt_idx" ON "conflicts"("userId", "resolvedAt");

-- CreateIndex
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "booking_page_views_eventTypeId_date_key" ON "booking_page_views"("eventTypeId", "date");
CREATE INDEX "booking_page_views_eventTypeId_idx" ON "booking_page_views"("eventTypeId");

-- AddForeignKey
ALTER TABLE "booking_page_views" ADD CONSTRAINT "booking_page_views_eventTypeId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("eventTypeId") REFERENCES "event_types"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;
SQL
echo "DONE: $MIGRATION_DIR"

cd /Users/cb/git/calendar-sync && git add \
  packages/backend/prisma/schema.prisma \
  packages/backend/prisma/migrations/ \
  packages/backend/src/sync-job.ts \
  packages/backend/src/routes/dashboard.ts \
  packages/backend/src/server.ts \
  packages/web/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx \
  packages/web/src/components/AppShell.tsx \
&& git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add sync health dashboard, conflict detection, and heartbeat indicator

Backend:
- New tables: SyncHealth (per-cycle metrics), Conflict (detected 
  overlaps), BookingPageView (daily aggregates)
- Sync health logging in sync-job.ts (fire-and-forget, never blocks sync)
- Dashboard API: /api/dashboard/briefing, weekly-summary, sync-status, 
  conflicts endpoints

Frontend:
- Dashboard rewrite: daily briefing with greeting, conflict banners, 
  weekly summary card (meetings, overlaps, integrity score), today's 
  events, upcoming bookings, collapsible sync health details
- Heartbeat indicator in sidebar (green/amber/red, polls every 5 min)
- Empty states: "Keine Termine heute. Das ist das Ziel."
EOF
)" && git push origin main 2>&1
